items.title: LIVE: US strikes Venezuela and says Maduro captured
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>Live from Caracas and Venezuela border. The United States hit Venezuela with a “large-scale strike” early Saturday and said its president, Nicolás Maduro, had been captured and flown out of the country — an extraordinary nighttime operation announced by President Donald Trump on social media hours after the attack.</article>

items.title: Trump: US is 'not afraid of boots on the ground' in Venezuela
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Hours after President Donald Trump announced the capture of Venezuelan leader Nicolás Maduro, Trump left open the possibility that U.S. troops would have a presence in the country. “We're not afraid of boots on the ground if we have to,” he said.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: 'Terrifying experience': Venezuela resident recounts US strike
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Yanire Lucas, a Caracas resident whose house sits pressed up next to a Venezuelan military base struck overnight, said she began to hear explosions next to her house around 1:50 in the morning. Lucas said the terrified family took shelter when the first explosion shook their home. Earlier on Saturday, the United States hit Venezuela with a “large-scale strike” and said President Nicolás Maduro and his wife were captured and flown out of the country. (AP Video by Juan Arraez).

#venezuela 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Trump posts photo of Maduro and says US plans to tap Venezuela's oil reserves
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>The United States hit Venezuela with a “large-scale strike” early Saturday and said President Nicolás Maduro and his wife were captured and flown out of the country after months of stepped-up pressure by Washington. President Donald Trump insisted the U.S. government would run the country at least temporarily and was already doing so.

#venezuela 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Marco Rubio hints Cuba could be next after US captures Maduro in Venezuela
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>President Donald Trump says Cuba is "going to be something we'll end up talking about," after the US takes action in Venezuela. “If I lived in Havana and I was in the government, I'd be concerned at least a little bit,” Sec. of State Marco Rubio says.

#venezuela #cuba 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.content: <article>Watch live as stars including Leonardo DiCaprio, Miley Cyrus and Timothée Chalamet arrive at the Palm Springs International Film Festival Awards Gala in California.</article>

items.title: AP reporter describes scene in Venezuela after US captures Maduro
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>The U.S. is now deciding next steps for Venezuela, President Donald Trump said Saturday on Fox News, adding, “We’ll be involved in it very much.” The Associated Press Regina García Cano explains from Venezuela's capital, Caracas. 

#venezuela 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Video shows explosions in Venezuela during US military operation
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>At least seven explosions and low-flying aircraft were heard around 2 a.m. local time on Saturday in Venezuela's capital, Caracas, during a U.S. military operation. Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro and his wife, taken overnight from their home on a military base, are aboard a U.S. warship on their way to New York, where they are to face criminal charges.

#venezuela #maduro #trump</article>

items.title: LIVE: Trump speaks after US strikes Venezuela and captures Maduro
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>Watch live as President Donald Trump holds a news conference. The United States hit Venezuela with a “large-scale strike” early Saturday and said its president had been captured and flown out of the country — an extraordinary nighttime operation announced by Trump on social media hours after the attack.</article>

items.title: Trump says the US is 'going to run' Venezuela until 'safe' transition
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>President Donald Trump addressed the nation after the United States captured Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro and flew him out of the country in a military operation early in the day that plucked a sitting leader from office.

#venezuela #trump</article>

items.title: Trump says US is 'going to run' Venezuela until safe transition of power
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Trump says U.S. is ‘going to run’ Venezuela until transition of power. There are no visible signs the U.S. is controlling the country. 

#trump #venezuela #maduro</article>

items.title: Trump says 'air, land and sea' assault was used to capture Maduro
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>The United States captured Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro and flew him out of the country in a stunning military operation early Saturday that plucked a sitting leader from office — the culmination of months of escalating Trump administration pressure on the oil-rich South American nation.

#venezuela #trump #maduro</article>

items.title: Starmer reacts after US strikes Venezuela and captures Maduro
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>The attack came after months of intense pressure on Nicolás Maduro's government — a nighttime operation announced by U.S. President Donald Trump on social media. The legal authority for the strike — and whether Trump consulted Congress beforehand — was not immediately clear. 

#venezuela

<article>The United States hit Venezuela with a “large-scale strike” early Saturday and said its president had been captured and flown out of the country after months of intense pressure on Nicolás Maduro's government — an extraordinary nighttime operation announced by President Donald Trump on social media hours after the attack.
